title: alchemilla vulgaris var. aggregata
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. aggregata, also known as the common lady's mantle or lady's tears, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can aid in wound healing and soothing digestive issues. Its health benefits include reducing menstrual cramps and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as supporting skin health and reducing the appearance of wrinkles. Alchemilla vulgaris var. aggregata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
